title: Dianoga pie

{{Quote|Here ya go—krayt milk and tasty dianoga pie.|A bartender|<ref name="Dark Empire" />}}
'''Dianoga pie''' was the most popular of the [[Foodstuff/Legends|dishes]] made of [[Dianoga/Legends|dianoga]] meat.<ref name="alien species">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> The savory [[Pie/Legends|pie]] had a [[Color/Legends|beige]] crust and was stuffed with a filling,<ref name="Dark Empire" /> and the [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] [[Species/Legends|species]] had a particular fondness for it among other meat products.<ref name="TOR" /> At some point, a [[Imperial Officers Field Guide (in-universe)|field guide]] for [[Imperial officer/Legends|officers]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] noted that Imperial [[Chef/Legends|chefs]] could use dianogas to make a tasty pie, although [[Troop/Legends|troops]] were unlikely to come back for second servings.<ref name="guide">{{InsiderCite|96|Imperial Officers Field Guide}}</ref> The pies, when served with [[krayt milk]], were the house special at the [[Meltdown Café]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="Dark Empire" />

In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, which include the appearance of [[Dianoga/Legends|dianoga]] [[Pie/Legends|pie]] in the series' [[Dark Empire II 2|second issue]], to [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]].</ref> the Wookiee [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] visited the [[Cafe/Legends|café]]. The [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] there asked him what he wanted to [[Diet/Legends|eat]], but as he did not understand the Wookiee [[Shyriiwook/Legends|language]], he simply gave a slice of dianoga pie and a cup filled with [[Krayt dragon/Legends|krayt]] [[Milk/Legends|milk]] to Chewbacca, noting that the pie would be tasty.<ref name="Dark Empire" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dianoga pie first appeared in the [[Dark Empire II 2|second issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series, which was written by [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated by [[Cam Kennedy]], and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Dark Empire" /> on [[January 24]], [[1995]].<ref name="jan 24">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54064/star_wars_dark_empire_ii_1994_2|text=Star Wars: Dark Empire II (1994) #2}}</ref> The [[2012]] reference guide ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]'' capitalizes it as "Dianoga pie," which this article assumes is an error as it is the only source to do so.<ref name="TOR" />
